sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83512" key="plastologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλαστο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n83512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tell fictions, lie</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπλ</foreign>-).</sense> </entryFree>
